nasb.text: For each time I speak, I cry aloud; I proclaim violence and destruction, Because for me the word of the Lord has resulted In reproach and derision all day long.

esv.text: For whenever I speak, I cry out, I shout, “Violence and destruction!” For the word of the Lord has become for me a reproach and derision all day long.

cnv.text: 因為我每次發言，都大聲呼叫； 我呼喊，說：“有強暴和毀滅！” 耶和華的話使我整天受人辱罵和譏諷。

ccb.text: 我每次说预言，都大声疾呼： “暴力和毁灭要来了！” 我因传讲耶和华的话而终日遭受侮辱和讥笑。
